grammar:
start: "[" _sep{NUMBER, ","} "]"
                       _sep{item, delim}: item | _sep{item, delim} delim item
                       NUMBER: /\d+/
                       %ignore " "

start: "[" _sep{NUMBER, ","} "]"
                       _sep{item, delim}: item | _sep{item, delim} delim item
                       NUMBER: /\d+/
                       %ignore " "

start: "[" sep{NUMBER, ","} "]"
                       sep{item, delim}: item (delim item)*
                       NUMBER: /\d+/
                       %ignore " "

start: "[" sep{NUMBER, ","} "]"
                       sep{item, delim}: item (delim item)*
                       NUMBER: /\d+/
                       %ignore " "

start: "a" /b+/ C
                    C: "C" | D
                    D: "D" E
                    E: "e"

start: "a" /b+/ C
                    C: "C" | D
                    D: "D" E
                    E: "e"

start: A
                A: B C
                B: /./s
                C: /./

start: A
                A: B C
                B: /./s
                C: /./

start: A
                A: B | C
                B: "b"i
                C: "c"

start: A
                A: B | C
                B: "b"i
                C: "c"

start: EKS* x
                x: EKS
                unused: x*
                EKS: "x"

start: EKS* x
                x: EKS
                unused: x*
                EKS: "x"

start: a a
                a: "." | b
                b: "."

start: a a
                a: "." | b
                b: "."

start: b c d
                b: "B"
                c: | "C"
                d: | "D"

start: b c d
                b: "B"
                c: | "C"
                d: | "D"

start: noun verb noun        -> simple
                        | noun verb "like" noun -> comparative

                noun: adj? NOUN
                verb: VERB
                adj: ADJ

                NOUN: "flies" | "bananas" | "fruit"
                VERB: "like" | "flies"
                ADJ: "fruit"

                %import common.WS
                %ignore WS

start: noun verb noun        -> simple
                        | noun verb "like" noun -> comparative

                noun: adj? NOUN
                verb: VERB
                adj: ADJ

                NOUN: "flies" | "bananas" | "fruit"
                VERB: "like" | "flies"
                ADJ: "fruit"

                %import common.WS
                %ignore WS

ANY:  /[a-zA-Z0-9 ]+/
            a.2: "A" b+
            b.2: "B"
            c:   ANY

            start: (a|c)*

ANY:  /[a-zA-Z0-9 ]+/
            a.2: "A" b+
            b.2: "B"
            c:   ANY

            start: (a|c)*

COMMENT: /(!|(\/\/))[^\n]*/
            %ignore COMMENT
            %import common.WS -> _WS
            %import common.INT
            start: "INT"i _WS+ INT _WS*

COMMENT: /(!|(\/\/))[^\n]*/
            %ignore COMMENT
            %import common.WS -> _WS
            %import common.INT
            start: "INT"i _WS+ INT _WS*

a: b
            b: c*
            c: a

a: b
            b: c*
            c: a

a: b
            b: c*
            c: a

a: b
            b: c*
            c: a

a: x
            x: x? b
            b:

a: x
            x: x? b
            b:

a: x
            x: x? b
            b:

a: x
            x: x? b
            b:

start: A B | AB
            A.2: "a"
            B: "b"
            AB: "ab"

start: A B | AB
            A.2: "a"
            B: "b"
            AB: "ab"

start: A B | AB
            A: "a"
            B.-20: "b"
            AB.-10: "ab"

start: A B | AB
            A: "a"
            B.-20: "b"
            AB.-10: "ab"

start: A B | AB
            A: "a"
            B: "b"
            AB.3: "ab"

start: A B | AB
            A: "a"
            B: "b"
            AB.3: "ab"

start: BOM? char+
            BOM: "\xef\xbb\xbf"
            char: CHAR1 | CHAR2 | CHAR3 | CHAR4
            CONTINUATION_BYTE: "\x80" .. "\xbf"
            CHAR1: "\x00" .. "\x7f"
            CHAR2: "\xc0" .. "\xdf" CONTINUATION_BYTE
            CHAR3: "\xe0" .. "\xef" CONTINUATION_BYTE CONTINUATION_BYTE
            CHAR4: "\xf0" .. "\xf7" CONTINUATION_BYTE CONTINUATION_BYTE CONTINUATION_BYTE

start: BOM? char+
            BOM: "\xef\xbb\xbf"
            char: CHAR1 | CHAR2 | CHAR3 | CHAR4
            CONTINUATION_BYTE: "\x80" .. "\xbf"
            CHAR1: "\x00" .. "\x7f"
            CHAR2: "\xc0" .. "\xdf" CONTINUATION_BYTE
            CHAR3: "\xe0" .. "\xef" CONTINUATION_BYTE CONTINUATION_BYTE
            CHAR4: "\xf0" .. "\xf7" CONTINUATION_BYTE CONTINUATION_BYTE CONTINUATION_BYTE

start: N W

            %import common.NUMBER -> N
            %import common.WORD -> W
            %import common.WS
            %ignore WS

start: N W

            %import common.NUMBER -> N
            %import common.WORD -> W
            %import common.WS
            %ignore WS

start: NUMBER WORD

            %import common (NUMBER, WORD, WS)
            %ignore WS

start: NUMBER WORD

            %import common (NUMBER, WORD, WS)
            %ignore WS

start: NUMBER WORD

            %import common.NUMBER
            %import common.WORD
            %import common.WS
            %ignore WS

start: NUMBER WORD

            %import common.NUMBER
            %import common.WORD
            %import common.WS
            %ignore WS

start: _field+
            _field: f1 | f2 | f3
            f1: INT
            f2: INT "M"?
            f3: INT "M"
            %import common.INT

start: _field+
            _field: f1 | f2 | f3
            f1: INT
            f2: INT "M"?
            f3: INT "M"
            %import common.INT

start: a b | ab
            a: "a"
            b: "b"
            ab: "ab"

start: a b | ab
            a: "a"
            b: "b"
            ab: "ab"

start: ab bc cd de f
            !ab: "A" "B"?
            !bc: "B"? "C"?
            !cd: "C"? "D"?
            !de: "D"? "E"
            !f: "F"

start: ab bc cd de f
            !ab: "A" "B"?
            !bc: "B"? "C"?
            !cd: "C"? "D"?
            !de: "D"? "E"
            !f: "F"

start: "go" tail*
            !tail : SA "@" | SB "@" | SC "@" | SD "@"
            SA : "a" /\n/
            SB : /b./s
            SC : "c" /[^a-z]/
            SD : "d" /\s/

start: "go" tail*
            !tail : SA "@" | SB "@" | SC "@" | SD "@"
            SA : "a" /\n/
            SB : /b./s
            SC : "c" /[^a-z]/
            SD : "d" /\s/

start: A B C
                          A: "\x01"
                          B: /\x02/
                          C: "\xABCD"

start: A B C
                          A: "\x01"
                          B: /\x02/
                          C: "\xABCD"

start: ABC
                          ABC: /  a      b c
                               d
                                e f
                           /x

start: ABC
                          ABC: /  a      b c
                               d
                                e f
                           /x

start: UNIA UNIB UNIA
                        UNIA: /£/
                        UNIB: /ā/

start: UNIA UNIB UNIA
                        UNIA: /£/
                        UNIB: /ā/

start: UNIA UNIB UNIA UNIC
                        UNIA: /\xa3/
                        UNIB: "\U0010FFFF"
                        UNIC: /\U00100000/ /\n/

start: UNIA UNIB UNIA UNIC
                        UNIA: /\xa3/
                        UNIB: "\U0010FFFF"
                        UNIC: /\U00100000/ /\n/

start: UNIA UNIB UNIA UNIC
                        UNIA: /\xa3/
                        UNIB: "\u0101"
                        UNIC: /\u0203/ /\n/

start: UNIA UNIB UNIA UNIC
                        UNIA: /\xa3/
                        UNIB: "\u0101"
                        UNIC: /\u0203/ /\n/

start: UNIA UNIB UNIA UNIC
                        UNIA: /\xa3/
                        UNIB: "a\u0101b\ "
                        UNIC: /a?\u0101c\n/

start: UNIA UNIB UNIA UNIC
                        UNIA: /\xa3/
                        UNIB: "a\u0101b\ "
                        UNIC: /a?\u0101c\n/

start: a+ b a* "b" a*
                        b: "b"
                        a: "a"

start: a+ b a* "b" a*
                        b: "b"
                        a: "a"

start: list
                            ?list: item*
                            item : A
                            A: "a"

start: list
                            ?list: item*
                            item : A
                            A: "a"

start: list
                            ?list: item* "!"?
                            item : A
                            A: "a"

start: list
                            ?list: item* "!"?
                            item : A
                            A: "a"

start: list
                            ?list: item+
                            item : A
                            A: "a"

start: list
                            ?list: item+
                            item : A
                            A: "a"

start: list
                            ?list: item+ "!"
                            item : A
                            A: "a"

start: list
                            ?list: item+ "!"
                            item : A
                            A: "a"

start: list
                            list: | item "," list
                            item : A
                            A: "a"

start: list
                            list: | item "," list
                            item : A
                            A: "a"
